zh.Bibury, Cotswold district, Gloucestershi: 英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾比波利
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Tryon於1645年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾比波利時，他的父親William Tryon50歲，母親Rebeccah Cooke51歲。他於1670年之前與Mary Steele在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1669年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德。他去世於1711年10月12日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德享年66歲，埋葬在美國康乃狄克州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德維利亞 其特利。

zh-hans.Bibury, Cotswold district, Gloucestershi: 英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾比波利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Tryon于1645年出生在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾比波利时，他的父亲William Tryon50岁，母亲Rebeccah Cooke51岁。他于1670年之前与Mary Steele在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1669年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德。他去世于1711年10月12日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德享年66岁，埋葬在美国康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德維利亞 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Tryon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lincolnshire, Rutland and Northamptonshire): altered form of Dutch Trion, itself a shortened variant of Tirion, a cognate of Walloon and French Thiry .

History: A Northamptonshire family of this name trace their descent from Peter Trieon (died 1611), who went to England from the Netherlands c. 1562. His son, Moses Tryon, was high sheriff of Northamptonshire in 1624. William Tryon (born 1729 in Surrey, England) was the last provincial governor of NY; he gave his name to Tryon County, the district which took in the Mohawk Valley; after the American Revolution this huge area was split into Montgomery, Fulton, and other counties.

variants.name: Thiry
meanings: Walloon, French (mainly Lorraine and Ardennes), and Luxembourgish: from the personal name Thiry, a regional variant of French Thierry . This surname is also found in Germany and in the Flemish part of Belgium.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Tryon was born in 1645, in Bibury, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Tryon, was 50 and his mother, Rebeccah Cooke, was 51. He married Mary Steele before 1670, in Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He lived in Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America in 1669. He died on 12 October 1711, in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 66, and was buried in Village Cemetery, Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Tryon est né en 1645, à Bibury, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Tryon, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Rebeccah Cooke, avait 51 ans. Il a épousé Mary Steele avant 1670, à Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il a vécu à Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1669. Il est décédé le 12 octobre 1711, à Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Village Cemetery, Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Tryon 1645 in Bibury, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Tryon 50 und seine Mutter Rebeccah Cooke 51. Er hat vor 1670 in Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America Mary Steele geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. 1669 hat er in Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America gelebt. Er starb am 12. Oktober 1711 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Village Cemetery, Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Tryon è nato il nel 1645 nel Bibury, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Tryon, aveva 50 anni e il suo madre, Rebeccah Cooke, aveva 51 anni. Lui sposato Mary Steele prima del 1670, nel Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Vissuto a Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America nel 1669. Morì il 12 ottobre 1711, nel Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a Village Cemetery, Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colo: イギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードウエスエルスフィールド

ja.lifeSummary: William Tryonが1645年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアビブリーで生まれた時，父William Tryonは50歳，母Rebeccah Cookeは51歳であった。1670年以前にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードでMary Steeleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1669年にはイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードに住んでいた。彼は1711年10月12日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードウエスエルスフィールドで66歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ハートフォードウエスエルスフィールドヴィラッジ セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colo: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드
ko.Wethersfield Village Cemetery, Wethersfi: 미국 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드 비라지 세멧리

ko.Wethersfield, Hartford, Colony of Connec: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드

ko.Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Bri: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드
ko.lifeSummary: William Tryon(이)가 1645년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 비버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Tryon(은)는 50세였고, 그의 어머니 Rebeccah Cooke(은)는 51세였다. 그는 1670년 이전 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드에서 Mary Steele(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1669년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드에서 살았다. 그는 1711년 10월 12일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드 비라지 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Tryon nasceu em 1645, em Bibury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Tryon, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Rebeccah Cooke, tinha 51 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Steele antes 1670, em Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele viveu em Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America em 1669. Ele faleceu em 12 de outubro de 1711, em Wethersfield, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em Village Cemetery, Wethersfield, Hartford, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Bri: ветирсфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Tryon родился в 1645 г. в местности бибури, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Tryon было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Rebeccah Cooke, 51. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Steele перед 1670 г. в местности хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он жил в местности хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1669 году. Он умер 12 октября 1711 г. в местности ветирсфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности вилладж кеметири, ветирсфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Tryon nació en 1645, en Bibury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Tryon, tenía 50 años y su mamá, Rebeccah Cooke, tenía 51 años. Se casó con Mary Steele antes de 1670, en Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Vivió en Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America en 1669. Murió el 12 de octubre de 1711, en Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en Village Cemetery, Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Estados Unidos.
